track.name: Institutional — 3 USD/lot, risk 1.5%
track.R_definition: 1R = 1.5% of capital at entry. If pnl_pct is in fractions → R = pnl_pct / 0.015; if pnl_% is in percent → R = pnl_% / 1.5; if pnl_r/r exists — use it only if it is already R at 1.5% risk.

strict_R_classification.note: Zero-R trades are excluded from the win/loss groups and from the PF denominator; for expectancy/std/min/max they are included as-is.

monthly_returns.csv.ret_m: Monthly return computed from the last EoM NAV with ffill and an anchor of 100k at t0−ε.

full_period_summary.csv.months: Number of months in the ret_m series.
full_period_summary.csv.sharpe_ann: Sharpe on monthly ret_m, annualized: (mean(r_m - rf_m)/stdev(r_m − rf_m, ddof=1))·√12; rf=0 by default.
full_period_summary.csv.sortino_ann: Sortino on monthly ret_m, annualized: (mean(r_m)/stdev(r_m[r_m<0], ddof=1))·√12 (target=0).
full_period_summary.csv.maxdd: Max drawdown on the monthly equity curve eq=Π(1+ret_m): min(eq/cummax(eq) − 1). Negative value.
full_period_summary.csv.mar_full: MAR over the full period: cagr/|maxdd|.
full_period_summary.csv.longest_underwater_months: Longest run of consecutive months with dd<0 (the recovery month with dd=0 is not included).
full_period_summary.csv.time_underwater_pct: Share of months with dd<0 over the full series.
full_period_summary.csv.n_trades: Number of trades over the full period (sum across trades_YYYY.csv).
full_period_summary.csv.profit_factor: PF = sum(R[R>+eps]) / |sum(R[R<-eps])| (on sums of wins and losses).
full_period_summary.csv.expectancy_r_mean: Mean R over all trades (including zeros).
full_period_summary.csv.expectancy_r_median: Median R over all trades (including zeros).
full_period_summary.csv.std_r: Sample σ of R (ddof=1) over all trades.
full_period_summary.csv.ulcer_index: UI: sqrt(mean(max(0, −dd)^2)) on the monthly dd curve.

yearly_summary.csv.ret_year: Annual return: Π(1+ret_m within the year) − 1.
yearly_summary.csv.maxdd_year: MaxDD on the monthly curve within the year.
yearly_summary.csv.trades: Number of trades in the year (from trades_YYYY.csv).
yearly_summary.csv.hit_rate: Share of trades with R>+eps within the year.

trades_full_period_summary.csv.n_trades: Total number of trades over the full period.

rolling_12m.csv.roll_12m_return: Cumulative return of the window: Π(1+r_m_window) − 1.
rolling_12m.csv.roll_12m_sharpe: Sharpe within the window: (mean/σ)·√12, rf=0, ddof=1.

rolling_36m.csv.maxdd_36m: MaxDD on the monthly curve within the window.

dd_quantiles.csv.drawdown_quantile: Value of the left-tail percentile of dd (negative).

kelly_summary.csv.f_opt: Optimal Kelly fraction, max E[log(1+f·R_w)] for f∈[0, f_cap].
kelly_summary.csv.obj_at_f_opt: Maximum value of E[log(1+f·R_w)] at f_opt.
kelly_summary.csv._notes: f_cap = min(0.10, 0.95/|min(R_w)|); R_w — winsorized R at 1%/99%.

monte_carlo_summary.csv.months: Length of the original series in months.
monte_carlo_summary.csv.block_len_months: Length of the circular block in months (e.g., 3).

monthly_returns.csv.ret_m: Monthly return within the year with an anchor of 100k at 01-01 00:00 UTC−ε.

yearly_summary.csv.ret_year: Within-year annual return from the monthly curve.
yearly_summary.csv.maxdd_year: Within-year MaxDD on the monthly curve.
yearly_summary.csv.trades: Number of trades in the year (from trades_YYYY.csv).
yearly_summary.csv.hit_rate: Share of trades with R>+eps within the year.

trades_full_period_summary.csv.n_trades: Number of trades across all years of the fixed track.

notes: Include the last incomplete month (NAV ffilled to EoM).
Do not drop months with no trades: ret_m = 0.
Underwater is computed on the monthly curve; the recovery month (dd=0) is not included in the run.
Sharpe uses rf=0 by default; if an annual rf is available, use rf_m = (1+rf_ann)^(1/12) − 1.
